utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections explicitly. Each section is fully detailed: 
- property includes type, location, price, currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, availability, viewing, and move_in_date — all necessary details.
- financing includes method, down_payment, closing_costs, interest_rate, term_years, monthly_payment_estimate, documentation_required, approval_timeline_days — fully specified.
- legal_services includes package_name, cost, currency, duration_days, included_features — complete.
- moving_services includes service_level, cost, currency, timeline_flexibility, move_date — complete.
- setup_services includes utility_package_type, cost, currency, services_included, setup_timeline_days — complete.
- total_budget includes property_price, down_payment, closing_costs, legal_services, moving_services, utility_setup, total_initial_cash_needed, note — complete.
All items are present and detailed, so all 6 out of 6 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution includes a purchase property (Semi-detached house in Midtown Toronto, CAD $720,000). This matches the category of 'purchase_properties'. The closest matching ground-truth item by price and description is 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD $750K), which shares similar characteristics (size, location type, and price range). The legal services package includes 'Premium Legal Package, Full Structural Survey2', which corresponds to the combination of 'Basic Legal Package' (since the cost is $800, matching that option exactly) and 'Full Structural Survey' (separate survey item). The moving service is 'standard (includes packing/unpacking)' with cost CAD $650, which matches 'Standard Moving'. The setup service is 'basic' at CAD $120, which matches 'Basic Utilities'. Therefore, ratings can be mapped accordingly.
